response.original_title: Save the Last Dance (2002 TV Movie)
response.overview: A young dancer, Sara Johnson, struggles to find her place after a major upheaval in her life. As she navigates new friendships, unexpected opportunities, and the emotional weight of her past, Sara discovers that dance may be the one thing capable of grounding her again. Blending drama, music, and romance, the film follows her journey toward healing, identity, and the courage to step back into the spotlight.
response.tagline: A young dancer fighting to rebuild her life, one step at a time.
response.title: Save the Last Dance (2002 TV Movie)
